message:
style: rustfmt formatting pass across multiple crates

Apply rustfmt to test assertions, function calls, and match arms that
had been formatted inconsistently. No behavioral changes — purely
whitespace and line-break adjustments for readability.

Affected crates: cli (robot.rs), db (pool.rs, sync.rs), guard (lib.rs,
guard_env_tests.rs), server (cleanup.rs, integrity_guard.rs), share
(bundle.rs, snapshot.rs), tools (macros.rs), wasm (lib.rs).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
